task_completion.description: Navigate to the calendar view for next week.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar application (e.g., Odoo Calendar) is open and displaying the week view for next week, where the tentative 'Hold: Q3 Budget Review' events are located.
The 'Hold: Q3 Budget Review' event previously scheduled on Tuesday (10:00 AM) is selected and deleted, evidenced by a deletion confirmation dialog or its disappearance from the Tuesday calendar slot.

The 'Hold: Q3 Budget Review' event previously scheduled on Thursday (11:00 AM) is selected and deleted, evidenced by a deletion confirmation dialog or its disappearance from the Thursday calendar slot.

task_completion.description: Rename the Wednesday 2:00 PM event to 'Q3 Budget Review'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wednesday 2:00 PM event is opened in an edit dialog, and the title is modified to exactly 'Q3 Budget Review', removing the 'Hold: ' prefix.

task_completion.description: Verify the final state of the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final calendar view shows the Wednesday 2:00 PM event saved as 'Q3 Budget Review'. There are no events named 'Hold: Q3 Budget Review' remaining on Tuesday or Thursday.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual calendar application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo Calendar GUI being used, rather than a text editor, database viewer, or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to modify the schedule.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks on events, uses the edit/delete buttons, and types in the GUI input fields, rather than executing terminal commands or API scripts to alter the calendar.

integrity.description: The agent did not alter unrelated calendar events.
integrity.visual_evidence: Only the 'Hold: Q3 Budget Review' events are clicked, edited, or deleted. Any other pre-existing events on the calendar remain untouched.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The initial events are named 'Hold: Q3 Budget Review' and are scheduled for Tuesday 10:00 AM, Wednesday 2:00 PM (14:00), and Thursday 11:00 AM. The agent must delete the Tuesday and Thursday events. The Wednesday 2:00 PM event must be renamed to exactly 'Q3 Budget Review' (removing the 'Hold: ' prefix). Success requires that no events matching 'Hold: Q3 Budget Review' remain on the calendar.
